task: Write a product description for a wireless Bluetooth speaker
constraints: max 50 words, include price, mention battery life, use enthusiastic tone, end with call-to-action
output: Experience crystal-clear sound anywhere with the SoundWave Pro! This portable Bluetooth speaker delivers 12 hours of battery life and rich bass in a compact design. Only $49.99. Perfect for beach days, picnics, and backyard parties. Grab yours today and elevate every moment!
constraints_met: max 50 words, include price, mention battery life, use enthusiastic tone, end with call-to-action

task: Write a weather report for a coastal city
constraints: exactly 3 sentences, include temperature in Celsius, mention wind conditions, use formal tone
output: The coastal metropolitan area will experience partly cloudy conditions throughout the day with temperatures reaching a high of 24 degrees Celsius. Southwesterly winds are expected to strengthen to 35 kilometers per hour by late afternoon, with gusts potentially reaching 50 kilometers per hour near exposed headlands. Marine conditions remain advisory-level, and residents are advised to secure outdoor furnishings accordingly.
constraints_met: exactly 3 sentences, include temperature in Celsius, mention wind conditions, use formal tone

constraints: max 75 words, mention specific dish, include star rating out of 5, mention service quality, include price range
output: Rating: 4.5 out of 5 stars. The truffle mushroom risotto at Bella Notte was exceptional — creamy, perfectly seasoned, and generously portioned. Service was attentive without being intrusive, with our waiter offering excellent wine pairing suggestions. The atmosphere is intimate and elegant. Entrees range from 18 to 35 dollars. Minor deduction for the 25-minute wait despite having a reservation. Highly recommended for special occasions.
constraints_met: max 75 words, mention specific dish, include star rating out of 5, mention service quality, include price range

task: Write a job posting for a software engineer
constraints: max 100 words, list exactly 4 requirements, mention remote work policy, include salary range, use professional tone
output: Software Engineer — Full-Time. We are seeking a talented software engineer to join our growing platform team. Requirements: (1) Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience, (2) 3+ years of experience with Python or Java, (3) proficiency with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure, (4) strong understanding of RESTful API design and microservices architecture. This role offers full remote work flexibility with optional access to our San Francisco office. Salary range: $120,000 to $160,000 annually, plus equity and comprehensive benefits.
constraints_met: max 100 words, list exactly 4 requirements, mention remote work policy, include salary range, use professional tone

task: Write a safety warning for a power tool
constraints: max 40 words, use imperative sentences, mention protective equipment, include emergency contact, use all caps for key warnings
output: ALWAYS wear safety goggles and hearing protection when operating this saw. Keep hands away from the blade guard. NEVER remove safety features. Disconnect power before changing blades. In case of injury, call emergency services at 112 immediately.
constraints_met: max 40 words, use imperative sentences, mention protective equipment, include emergency contact, use all caps for key warnings

output:
Silicon dreams glow
Algorithms weave through the night
Code becomes the world

output: 3 Days Left: Unlock 40% Savings on Premium Plans

task: Write a recipe summary for a healthy smoothie
constraints: max 60 words, list exactly 5 ingredients, include preparation time, mention nutritional benefit, use second person
output: Start your morning right with this energizing green smoothie. You will need: fresh spinach, one banana, Greek yogurt, almond milk, and a tablespoon of chia seeds. Blend all ingredients for 45 seconds until smooth. Preparation takes just 3 minutes. This nutrient-packed drink provides protein, fiber, and omega-3 fatty acids to fuel your day.
constraints_met: max 60 words, list exactly 5 ingredients, include preparation time, mention nutritional benefit, use second person

constraints: max 30 words, include specific time, mention key return, use polite tone, include room number reference
output: Dear guest, kindly note that checkout time is 11:00 AM. Please return your room key card to the front desk upon departure. We hope you enjoyed your stay in your suite.
constraints_met: max 30 words, include specific time, mention key return, use polite tone, include room number reference

task: Write a book blurb for a mystery novel
constraints: max 80 words, include protagonist name, mention setting, create suspense, end with a question, avoid revealing the ending
output: Detective Lena Vasquez thought she had seen everything in twenty years on the Stockholm police force. But when a renowned physicist is found dead in a locked laboratory with no signs of forced entry, she is drawn into a case that defies logic. As she uncovers connections between the victim, a shadowy research consortium, and a decades-old military experiment, Lena realizes the truth could be more dangerous than the crime itself. Can she solve the impossible before the killer strikes again?
constraints_met: max 80 words, include protagonist name, mention setting, create suspense, end with a question, avoid revealing the ending

constraints: exactly 2 sentences, mention duration, include difficulty level, mention calories burned, use motivating tone
output: This high-energy 45-minute intermediate HIIT class combines explosive cardio bursts with strength training to torch up to 600 calories while building lean muscle. Push your limits, shatter your personal records, and leave feeling unstoppable!
constraints_met: exactly 2 sentences, mention duration, include difficulty level, mention calories burned, use motivating tone

constraints: max 60 words, use bullet points for 3 changes, include version number, mention backward compatibility, use technical tone
output:
Release Notes — Version 3.4.2

• Added support for WebSocket connections with automatic reconnection and exponential backoff
• Fixed memory leak in the connection pooling module affecting long-running instances
• Improved query parser performance by 40% through optimized AST traversal

This release is fully backward compatible with versions 3.x. No migration steps required.
constraints_met: max 60 words, use bullet points for 3 changes, include version number, mention backward compatibility, use technical tone

constraints: max 50 words, include animal age, mention temperament, specify adoption fee, include vaccination status, use warm tone
output: Meet Biscuit, a gentle 3-year-old golden retriever looking for his forever home! This sweet boy is calm, great with children, and loves afternoon naps. Fully vaccinated and neutered. Adoption fee: $150, which includes microchipping. Come visit Biscuit — he is ready to fill your home with love!

constraints: max 80 words, include talk duration, mention target audience, list 3 key takeaways, use professional tone
output: Building Resilient Microservices: Lessons from Production (30-minute talk). Targeted at backend engineers and platform architects, this session shares battle-tested strategies for building fault-tolerant distributed systems. Key takeaways: (1) implementing circuit breaker patterns that prevent cascade failures, (2) designing idempotent APIs that gracefully handle retries, and (3) establishing observability practices that reduce mean time to resolution. Attendees will leave with actionable patterns applicable to any microservices architecture.
constraints_met: max 80 words, include talk duration, mention target audience, list 3 key takeaways, use professional tone

constraints: max 50 words, acknowledge the specific issue, offer compensation, include timeline for resolution, use empathetic tone, do not use the word 'sorry'
output: We understand how frustrating the delayed shipment of your order has been, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. As a gesture of goodwill, we are applying a 20% discount to your next purchase. Your package will arrive within 2 business days. We truly value your patience and loyalty.
constraints_met: max 50 words, acknowledge the specific issue, offer compensation, include timeline for resolution, use empathetic tone, do not use the word 'sorry'
